mission: Personal operations stack run by Claude Code + Hermes with specialized worker agents.

agents.name: Claude Code
agents.mission: Own MCP-heavy execution, coding, review, and scheduled work.

agents.name: Hermes
agents.mission: Coordinate, synthesize, build local tooling, and keep long-lived state/docs coherent.

agents.name: Coding Muscle
agents.mission: Handle bounded code changes and reviews in fresh contexts.

agents.name: Research Muscle
agents.mission: Do transcript review, web research, and summarize findings for the orchestrator.
